subject: ASAP: Frontend Engineer – TypeScript – Gaming
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the gaming sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Frontend Engineer with strong experience in TypeScript. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • TypeScript
  • AWS
  • Kubernetes
  • PostgreSQL

Details:
Client: FrostByte Games
Start: ASAP
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
